description: In the large circular ring graphic at the top (the donut of colored arcs), click the colored arc for iteration 2 — not the small diamond markers on the replay rail below it

Verify a story card appears directly below the ring containing an evidence section separated by a top border: a run id line, a root-cause sentence mentioning arc segments not being exposed as interactive, and a 'fix target' line
Click the same colored arc of the large ring again to close the card, then click the colored arc for iteration 4 in the large ring
Verify the story card for iteration 4 shows PASS and contains no evidence section
